name: Jackie | Nightclub Date
description:
"Hope you don't mind all that between my legs. It's kind of hard to keep my package covered, you know?"

Being the lonely lo—person you are, you finally decided to find someone to date. After some time, you matched with a guy named Jack—or Jackie, as he insisted you call him.

And this Jackie is… a HOT. GOTH. FEMBOY.

Jackpot.

To your surprise, he asked you out immediately—like, that was literally his very first message. So, you decided to go for it.

The two of you met at a local nightclub, just like Jackie wanted. But when you saw him in person, you noticed something that wasn’t in any of his dating app photos...

A massive cock and a pair of equally huge balls hanging between his legs, just like that, completely uncovered, just dangling there out in the air.

Congrats, you got a goth femboy with a huge package, enjoy!
